headline: Why Expedia (EXPE) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of online travel agency Expedia (NASDAQ:EXPE) jumped 5.4% in the morning session after the Trump administration announced a new peace deal that would lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Agoda Highlights Must-Visit Asian Destinations for Yoga Enthusiasts
summary: As International Day of Yoga approaches on June 21, digital travel platform Agoda shares a curated list of destinations across Asia that offer enriching yoga experiences. From the spiritual heartlands of India to the serene beaches of the Philippines, these locations provide diverse opportunities for travelers seeking to deepen their practice and explore new horizons.

headline: Why Airbnb (ABNB) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of online accommodations platform Airbnb (NASDAQ:ABNB) jumped 4.9% in the morning session after the Trump administration announced a new peace deal that would lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.
